title: PRODUCT NAME — Live Bold
fullPrompt:
Create a high-quality 8K portrait poster featuring [PRODUCT], inspired by the energy, vibrancy, and visual richness of premium commercial advertising campaigns. The poster should look like a modern, international fashion or lifestyle advertisement with bold, eye-catching aesthetics, playful textures, and layered graphic elements.

Character & Pose:

Feature a confident, charismatic model with expressive, lively facial expressions.
Pose the body with elegance, subtle movement, and natural hand positioning, resembling international fashion editorials.
Dynamic posture that conveys confidence, presence, and lifestyle appeal, suitable for a large-scale advertising poster.

Wardrobe & Styling:

Outfit: modern casual streetwear or fashion-forward attire.
Use layered clothing, subtle patterns, trendy fabric textures, and visually appealing color combinations.
Accessories: optional hats, bags, or jewelry to enhance the fashionable, premium look.

Visual Composition & Background:

Include energetic commercial design elements such as abstract shapes, colorful gradients, sticker-like decorations, light streaks, halftone textures, and dynamic framing details.
Typography: bold, modern, commercial-style text with stylish placement and graphic flourishes.
Background should enhance the overall vibe with layered textures and gradients, without overwhelming the main subject.
Optional supporting accents inspired by premium branding layouts to reinforce the commercial feel.

Lighting & Color:

Cinematic commercial lighting with balanced highlights and shadows for a polished, editorial look.
Vibrant, highly saturated color grading to make the poster visually rich, energetic, and eye-catching.
Ultra-detailed textures, realistic rendering, and sharp focus for professional advertising quality.

Overall Mood & Quality:

The poster should feel like a premium lifestyle or fashion campaign, blending playful energy, commercial appeal, and modern editorial aesthetics.
Clean, visually rich, highly detailed composition suitable for ultra-HD 8K printing.
Include subtle textures, layered ornaments, and dynamic framing details to enhance the branding atmosphere.
author: Admin

title: Flame Grilled Fashion Campaign Poster
fullPrompt:
Create a high-quality 8K portrait poster inspired by the bold and modern advertising style of Burger King campaigns, featuring a strong commercial fast-food aesthetic with vibrant colors, eye-catching promotional visuals, and a premium advertising composition. The overall poster should capture the energetic and flavorful atmosphere commonly seen in Burger King advertisements, combining modern branding visuals with stylish lifestyle-fashion elements.kainyafabiya
21h


Add typography inspired by authentic Burger King-style promotional posters, using bold commercial text placement, large dynamic headline compositions, playful fast-food advertising layouts, and layered graphic elements that enhance the premium campaign feel.Include decorative poster ornaments such as retro-modern shapes, flame-inspired accents, textured backgrounds, halftone details, sticker-style graphics, bold color blocking, glowing highlights, abstract promotional elements, and visually rich commercial decorations that make the poster feel lively, modern, and professionally designed. The subject’s pose and facial expression must not look identical to the reference photo. Recreate the subject with a more expressive, dynamic, and naturally confident appearance. Avoid stiff, awkward, emotionless, or flat-looking body language. The expression should feel charismatic, fashionable, energetic, and visually engaging, while the pose should carry the elegance and confidence of an international fashion model. Use natural movement, stylish hand positioning, confident posture, and subtle fashion-model attitude to create a premium commercial poster appearance. The outfit should feature modern casual streetwear with a stylish contemporary fashion aesthetic. Avoid plain or repetitive outfit choices. Use fashionable clothing combinations with layered styling, attractive color palettes, modern fabric textures, subtle graphic patterns, and trendy fashion details that feel visually rich without becoming messy.The wardrobe should blend naturally with the bold Burger King advertising atmosphere while still making the subject appear fashionable, premium, and camera-ready. Use cinematic commercial lighting with polished highlights, rich shadows, glossy advertisement-style reflections, and professional fast-food campaign color grading.The final composition should feel colorful, energetic, modern, stylish, visually rich, and professionally designed like a real international Burger King promotional poster campaign. Ultra-detailed textures, sharp focus, premium advertising quality, vibrant tones, realistic depth, clean composition, and ultra-HD 8K resolution.
